title: The Navy Closes In
description: On pages 12, 13, 14, 15, this part focuses on the war finally ends. Alabasta’s people absorb the end of the fighting while the Straw Hats and their allies prepare for the painful separation ahead.
scene: This scene belongs to the The War Finally Ends sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Wasn't the princess supposed to be missing...?

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: Shut your trap and sit still!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Will fall again as in times past.

summary: Alabasta’s people absorb the end of the fighting while the Straw Hats and their allies prepare for the painful separation ahead.
